updates.title: Every coding-agent session on your machine, on one board
updates.summary: Nine terminal tabs and no idea which session is which. CCC reads each engine's on-disk state and puts the whole fleet on one local board.

updates.title: Group your agent sessions the way you think about the work
updates.summary: A flat list of sessions stops meaning anything past a dozen. The project tree groups them under nestable objects, so strategy stays above the churn.
